title: List of ideas for this week
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! Here is the list of stock ideas for this week from my [Cyclical Barbell](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/103963) strategy.

|Company|Why Picked|Entry Target|Exit (Profit)|**Stop Loss**|Event to Watch|Expected Impact|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|**Vale S.A.** NYSE:VALE|Massive mining assets.|$17.10|$18.50|**$16.45**|China construction slows.|**Drop:** Less steel demand.|
|**Ryder System** NYSE:R|Market lead & NAV growth.|$215.00|$230.00|**$208.50**|Diesel prices spike.|**Drop:** High fuel eats profit.|
|**Hewlett Packard** NYSE:HPE|$75B stable asset base.|$23.80|$26.20|**$22.90**|Hormuz blockade.|**Drop:** Tech supply chain stall.|
|**Accenture** NYSE:ACN|11% high profit margins.|$185.00|$205.00|**$176.00**|Global trade war news.|**Drop:** Consulting slows down.|
|**USA Compression** NYSE:USAC|Price momentum.|$26.40|$28.50|**$25.20**|Less gas drilling.|**Drop:** Idle equipment.|
|**Myers Industries** NYSE:MYE|Specialized asset growth.|$21.50|$24.00|**$20.10**|Spending on RVs stops.|**Drop:** Leisure sales tank.|

# Summary of Risks

Global Conflict: Stocks like HPE and Ryder are very sensitive to oil prices and shipping routes (like the Strait of Hormuz). If a route closes, their costs go up, and stock prices usually go down.

China Demand: Vale is the most dependent on China's economy. If you see news that China's real estate market is struggling, Vale will likely drop soon after.

Interest Rates: High rates make it expensive for companies like Ryder and USAC to manage their high debt, which can trigger a "dropdown" in price even if the business is doing well.

  
Let me know if you have any questions :)
